/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/cc -g -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX10.15.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  CMakeFiles/redis.dir/main.c.o CMakeFiles/redis.dir/ziplist.c.o CMakeFiles/redis.dir/zskiplist.c.o CMakeFiles/redis.dir/sds.c.o  -o redis
